disambiguated.context: Both an optometrist and a line cook had their bags searched at the airport. A drug-sniffing dog had signalled that officers should look into the bag of the optometrist and, sure enough, they found quite a bit of cocaine. After the line cook's bag was flagged and searched, though, they were let go as it was apparently just a false alarm.
disambiguated.question: Who was free of drugs?
